name: web-reader
description: Firefox extension that reads webpage text aloud with macOS premium voices

scripts.build: web-ext build --overwrite-dest --ignore-files=native/** install.sh package.json package-lock.json README.md web-ext-artifacts/**
scripts.sign: web-ext sign --channel=unlisted --ignore-files=native/** install.sh package.json package-lock.json README.md web-ext-artifacts/**
scripts.lint: web-ext lint --ignore-files=native/** install.sh package.json package-lock.json README.md web-ext-artifacts/**
